subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. Render thou thanks unto God that thou hast enlightened thine own eyes and the eyes of others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ملکوت نامه رسید شکر کن خدا را که دیده روشن نمودی و دیدهای دیگرانرا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @entry by troops, @growth of the Cause
